name: Subterror Guru
name_jp: サブテラーの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: FLIP: You can add 1 "Subterror" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Subterror Guru". You can target 1 other face-up monster on the field; change that monster, also this card, to face-down Defense Position. This is a Quick Effect if you control another "Subterror" card. You can only use each effect of "Subterror Guru" once per turn.
mnst_eff: FLIP: You can add 1 "Subterror" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Subterror Guru". You can target 1 other face-up monster on the field; change that monster, also this card, to face-down Defense Position. This is a Quick Effect if you control another "Subterror" card. You can only use each effect of "Subterror Guru" once per turn.
eff: FLIP: You can add 1 "Subterror" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Subterror Guru". You can target 1 other face-up monster on the field; change that monster, also this card, to face-down Defense Position. This is a Quick Effect if you control another "Subterror" card. You can only use each effect of "Subterror Guru" once per turn.

misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
